cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The average sensor behavior may have shifted away from the normal reference pattern.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review process setpoints, chamber matching, calibration records, and lot-level recipe conditions.

cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The lot may show higher within-lot sensor variability or unstable process behavior.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review tool stability, run-to-run variation, maintenance history, and abnormal sensor fluctuation windows.

cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The lot may contain an unusual lower-tail sensor pattern relative to normal-reference behavior.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review lower-tail sensor readings, possible under-processing, sensor dropout, or transient boundary shifts.

cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The lot may contain an unusual upper-tail sensor pattern relative to normal-reference behavior.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review upper-tail sensor readings, possible over-processing, transient spikes, tool instability, or boundary shifts.

cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The lot may have repeated process-control rule violations.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review control-chart rule violations, recipe context, and recent process-window changes.

cause_hypothesis_table.hypothesis: The lot may contain a large standardized process excursion.
cause_hypothesis_table.recommended_review: Review the strongest SPC excursion, nearby lots, and whether the excursion aligns with known process shifts.
